Banner.subtitle: Software Developer
Banner.Description: I'm a software engineer graduated from EPITA, with 4 years of experience as a fullstack developer at Thales. I build modern interfaces, multiplayer games, collaborative web apps, and much more. I specialize in Angular, Node.js, and Unreal Engine 5, focusing on quality, performance, and user experience.
AboutMe.Title: About me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: Graduated from EPITA with a semester in the United States, I am a computer engineer specialized in fullstack development. With 4 years of experience at Thales, I design modern web interfaces and flight debriefing systems using Angular, combining performance and user experience.

Alongside my professional work, I develop personal projects ranging from online multiplayer games built with Unreal Engine 5 to MERN web applications for daily management and real-time data sharing. My work relies on technologies such as Angular, React, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, and Unreal Engine 5, with a strong focus on quality, performance, and interactive experience.
Certified Scrum Master (PSM I), I apply an agile approach to turn ideas into complete solutions, whether for web applications or video games.
Among the technologies I use regularly are:

FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project
Contact.Title: Let’s talk!
Contact.Content: Driven by curiosity and creativity, I’m constantly exploring new ways to blend technology, design, and interactivity. I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations in software or game development, so don’t hesitate to reach out and let’s build something amazing together!

Experience.Jobs.Title: Frontend Developer
Description: Development of a flight debriefing and playback system in TypeScript/Angular/Cesium.
Development of a full-stack web application (TypeScript, Express, MongoDB, Rollup, Node, Lerna) enabling data sharing through a dedicated API.
Certified Scrum Master: ceremonies facilitation, team coordination, documentation, and code quality.

Experience.Jobs.Title: 4th Year Internship
Description: Improved a flight plan analysis tool in Java.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Junior Developer Intern
Description: Developed a user interface for a traffic regulation project.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: NightMaze
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Development of NightMaze, a cooperative online multiplayer survival and exploration game set in a procedurally generated haunted maze, built with Unreal Engine 5.7 (C++/Blueprints) and available as a playtest on Steam. Features include procedural generation with PCG Graph, dynamic AI using Behavior Trees and AI Perception, a cooperative interface (HUD, shared inventory, network notifications), full Steamworks integration (lobbies, matchmaking, advanced replication), performance optimization (Nanite, LODs and Level Streaming)

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: MERN Application
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: HomeApp is a collaborative web application developed with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js). It allows users to manage shared shopping lists, organize a personal or family agenda, and send automated reminders for important events. The app includes a secure login and authentication system to manage user accounts. The frontend is fully responsive for desktop and mobile use, while the backend ensures robust data management and secure API handling. It also features asynchronous notifications, real-time updates for collaborative tasks, and an intuitive user experience designed to simplify daily organization.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: File Server
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Developed a secure full-stack web application enabling users to upload, store, and share files through an internal web interface with role-based access control. The backend was built in TypeScript with Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, implementing authentication, access management, and REST APIs. The frontend was developed in TypeScript using a Lerna monorepo with Rollup for modular bundling and responsive UI design. The entire architecture was Dockerized and integrated into a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline to automate builds, testing, and deployments, emphasizing security, maintainability, and automation.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Connected soap dispenser
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Development of a connected soap dispenser based on Arduino, designed to estimate the remaining soap level by tracking the number of uses relative to the reservoir’s capacity. When the dispenser detects that it is nearly empty, it automatically sends a notification to a mobile application developed with Android Studio.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: GNK (Genotron)
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Live action role-playing game built in a team. Multiple storylines and scenarios. Supervised by a coach and managed using agile methodology.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Cloud Project
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Development of a hybrid cloud using OpenStack for private and AWS for public infrastructure.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Web Project
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Online ticketing website for the school using Django (Python).

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Chess
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Development of a C++ chess game with built-in artificial intelligence.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: 42sh
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Linux shell developed from scratch in C.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Formula One
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: AI in C controlling a car to finish a race as fast as possible.
